// purpose: Type-checks the viewer's TypeScript modules. esbuild stays the build
// rationale: pipeline (it strips types and bundles natively); tsc here is a
//: lint-only step run via `npm run typecheck`.
// strict-overrides: noImplicitAny stays off: viewer is heavy on dynamic browser-host
// strict-overrides.2: globals (echarts, cytoscape, vscode webview API) typed `any` in
// strict-overrides.3: ambient declarations. Per-call tightening is a future ratchet,
// strict-overrides.4: best pursued after engine-types.d.ts adoption in the engine.
